reference: Hello, dear. Welcome to the Health Center for Mothers. Walking is an important milestone for growing babies. It can vary significantly and depends on many factors such as nutrition, genetic factors, constitutional factors, environmental conditions, seasonal factors, socioeconomic status, and any chronic disease—prenatal or postnatal. Currently, rickets is a common concern in the living scenario. Sometimes walking may start at the age of fifteen months. Improve his nutrition, and consider adding vitamin D and multivitamins. I hope he will start walking soon. Thank you.
